title: Round 2 code review of dev-department plugin post-fixes
job:
You are the Code Reviewer. This is Round 2 — the previous review found critical issues that have been fixed. Re-review the entire plugin.

Read ALL files in plugins/dev-department/ including the fixes that were just applied.

Previous review is at logs/code-review-phase1.md — read it to see what was flagged.

For each previous finding, check if it was FIXED or STILL PRESENT:
- C1: StateStore typed maps (was Map<string, any>)
- C2: UI wired to StateStore
- C3: Sidebar vs tab differentiated
- C4: PhaseList component used (not inline duplicate)
- E1: ref prop renamed in ConversationRefs
- E2: deleteSpec and deletePRD added
- E3: Cascade delete on project and phase
- E4: CRUD stubs for Phase 2 entities
- E5: phases state setter included
- W1-W7: Check each warning

Write your Round 2 review to logs/code-review-phase1-round2.md with:
- APPROVE / REQUEST CHANGES
- Status of each previous finding: FIXED / STILL PRESENT / PARTIALLY FIXED
- Any NEW issues found
- Final verdict

Commit.
